sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, url String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = 'test_table') WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET url = 'http://newexample.com' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = 'test_table') WHERE url LIKE 'http://%';
